news.headline: 74 Congress members earn perfect 100% on FRC Action's 2023 Vote Scorecard, awarded by Family Research Council.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Family Research Council Action (FRC Action), the legislative branch of Family Research Council, disclosed its 2023 Vote Scorecard and declared the recipients of the One Hundred Percent Award. This accolade is given yearly to lawmakers who have achieved a perfect score in their voting record.

news.headline: CrossCountry Mortgage tops Scotsman Guide's Top Veteran Originators list, doubling CCM Veteran originators.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) based in Cleveland, emerged as the top retail mortgage lender nationwide. Notably, they have the biggest representation of Veterans on the prestigious Scotsman Guide Top Veteran Originators list. This achievement is underscored by CCM doubling the count of their Veteran originators in comparison to previous figures, illustrating their dominance in the industry.

Ownership declaration (Form 8.3) for Balanced Commercial Property Trust Limited is filed.
Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) to reveal Q2 2024 financial results on July 23, 2024, after market open.

The announcement will be made before the market opens on Tuesday, July 23, 2024. The press release will include details on the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: £650.0 million worth of bonds sold by BoE in auction, with bids totaling £1.07 billion. Operation cover ratio at 1.64.
Dias Geophysical acquires Gap Geophysics, expanding capabilities. Leading provider in cutting-edge services.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Saskatoon, SK, Dias Geophysical, a top geophysical services provider, revealed its acquisition of Gap Geophysics of Australia. The latter, recognized for its inventive solutions and customer-centric strategies, is a well-known entity in the industry.

news.summary: Ballotpedia has just published its 2024 "State of Election Administration Mid-Year Report," detailing all election-related legislative developments in the United States for the first half of the year. The report covers the period from January 1 to the present date. This annual report provides crucial insights into the status and progress of election administration across the country. Stay informed on the latest data and trends shaping the electoral landscape with this comprehensive analysis.

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Global Car Carrier Market: Insights & Forecast (2024-2028)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. Forecasts suggest that the global car carrier market could reach a value of US$1035.36 million by 2028, with a projected growth rate of 3% between 2024 and 2028. Contributing to this growth are factors such as the increasing urban population, higher vehicle sales, a growing demand for foreign vehicles, and advancements in vessel designs.

Explore developments in blockchain technology, DeFi, NFTs, Web3, and regulatory measures affecting the crypto space. Stay in the loop with the rapidly changing landscape of digital currencies.

news.headline: Ingka Investments invests in Extell's new office and retail tower on Fifth Avenue in New York. IKEA's largest retailer.
news.summary: Ingka Investments, the investment branch of Ingka Group, the primary global retailer of IKEA, has decided to invest in Extell's upcoming premier office and retail building in New York City. This notable move was announced on July 1, 2024, underscoring Ingka's commitment to expanding its portfolio. Ingka Group holds the majority ownership of IKEA stores across the globe, making this investment decision a strategic one. The specific financial details and the extent of the investment by Ingka were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: V. Buterin suggests faster Ethereum trades with single-slot finality to address challenges in epoch-and-slot mechanism.
news.summary: Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, suggested transitioning from Ethereum's current epoch-and-slot mechanism to a single-slot finality system. This proposed change comes with the recognition of several critical obstacles that may arise.

news.headline: Taxfyle launches AI tools to reduce 1040 prep cost by 40% & improve margins, addressing staffing shortages. Platform leverages technology for efficiency.
news.summary: Today, Taxfyle, a fast-growing startup, has unveiled a set of innovative tools that incorporate artificial intelligence to combat severe staff shortages in the accounting sector. Based in Miami, the company is revolutionizing the industry by harnessing technology to streamline their services and provide a solution to the issue. This announcement comes as Taxfyle accelerates its growth, positioning itself as a trailblazer in leveraging AI for accounting services.

news.headline: Hedera users targeted by phishing scammer, $70K stolen in address scam. Crypto space faces bugs, hacks this week.
news.summary: This week, significant developments in cybersecurity within the crypto industry include the implementation of bug fixes, reports on phishing scams, and incidents of crypto exchange hacks. The sector continues to see a high number of malicious activities targeting digital assets and platforms. Stay informed and updated on the latest cybersecurity threats and measures to protect your crypto assets.

news.headline: EU drops plan to scan messaging apps under chat control bill. Privacy concerns remain despite victory for WhatsApp and Signal.
news.summary: European Union lawmakers have decided not to proceed with proposals to scan messaging applications. However, privacy activists are cautious in their reactions despite this decision.

news.headline: Saucony athlete Malindi Elmore to run Marathon in Paris in Endorphin Elite 2 shoe with new foam. 3-time Canadian Olympian.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking development, a revolutionary new super shoe has been introduced with an advanced foam technology aimed at maximizing athletic performance. The brand behind this innovation, Saucony, a prominent global performance running lifestyle company, disclosed this game-changing update on July 1, 2024. Notably, the product launch was celebrated alongside the announcement involving a distinguished three-time Canadian Olympic marathon runner and Saucony-sponsored athlete.

news.headline: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. will report Q2 2024 results on July 24, 2024, with earnings call on July 25 at 10am EST.
news.summary: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: EPRT) based in Princeton, N.J., will report its second quarter financial results for the period ending June 30, 2024, after the market closes on July 24, 2024. The company is scheduled to hold an earnings conference call and audio webcast on July 25, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. Investore and stakeholders can access the conference via webcast.

news.headline: Top trader Altcoin Sherpa examines the declining meme coin market and attributes the shift to investors' fatigue with VC-backed projects. Meme coins like DOGE, PEPE, BONK, and WIF continue to attract attention with their speculative nature and equitable distribution. Market watchers are now questioning the sustainability of the "meme coin super cycle." Sherpa suggests that meme coins are gaining popularity due to their potential for significant gains compared to traditional cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Avalanche.
news.summary: Prominent crypto trader Altcoin Sherpa recently discussed the meme coin market, questioning whether the "meme coin super cycle" is losing momentum. He delved into popular meme coins like Dogecoin (DOGE), Pepe (PEPE), Bonk (BONK), and Wif (WIF) as investors track their performance. Altcoin Sherpa emphasized the allure of meme coins, attributing their rise in popularity to investors' disillusionment with overvalued venture capital-backed projects. He praised meme coins for their speculative nature and fair distribution, making them enticing for those seeking substantial returns. Altcoin Sherpa advised that investments in major cryptos like Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) or midcaps like Avalanche (AVAX) may not yield significant profits compared to meme coins. The simplicity and accessibility of meme coins also contribute to their appeal among investors seeking significant gains. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

Texas de Brazil adds two new dishes to 3rd quarter menu: Moqueca de Camarão & Grilled Shrimp. Authentic Brazilian cuisine.
news.summary: Dallas, TX - On July 1, 2024, Texas de Brazil introduced two new dishes to its menu for the 3rd quarter. The popular Brazilian restaurant is now offering Moqueca de Camarão and Grilled Shrimp, traditional favorites among guests. Known for its authentic cuisine, Texas de Brazil continues to delight customers with its diverse menu options.

news.headline: LogRhythm announces 9th quarterly release, empowering security teams with trustworthy data for defending against cyberthreats.
news.summary: LogRhythm, based in Broomfield, Colorado, has unveiled its 9th consecutive quarterly release, focusing on leveraging data and signals to provide reliable insights for security teams. The company aims to bolster AI capabilities for security teams by offering top-tier data integrity in the cybersecurity sector. The latest release also includes streamlined data retention features, further enhancing LogRhythm's offerings for defending organizations against cyberthreats.

news.headline: Galloway Company appoints Troy Youngbauer as COO, effective July 1, 2024. Leading supplier of cream liqueur bases in the U.S.
news.summary: Neenah, Wisconsin - Leading cream liqueur bases, sweetened condensed milk, and ice cream bases supplier in the U.S., Galloway Company, has appointed Troy Youngbauer as Chief Operations Officer starting July 1, 2024. Youngbauer will now oversee operations at the company, which holds a significant market share in their industry.

news.headline: Williams from the Fed is confident in getting inflation back to 2%.
SPFL secures five-year title sponsorship deal with William Hill, beginning season 2024/25, set to be record-breaking.
news.summary: In London on July 1, 2024, the Scottish Professional Football League (SPFL) disclosed a significant title sponsorship agreement with William Hill, a prominent betting company in the UK. The unprecedented deal, lasting for five years and commencing from the 2024/25 season, marks a notable milestone for the league.

news.headline: Global Satellite Solar Cell Materials Market valued at $46.2 million in 2024, expected to reach $155.2 million by 2034. Notable upswing due to surge in LEO Satellite Deployments, increasing demand for high-efficiency multi-junction solar cells.
news.summary: A report titled "Satellite Solar Cell Materials Market - A Global and Regional Analysis: Focus on Application, Solar Cell Type, Material Type, Orbit, and Region - Analysis and Forecast, 2024-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for satellite solar cell materials is currently valued at $46.2 million in 2024 and is projected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.88%, reaching $155.2 million by 2034. This surge indicates a significant upward trend in the global satellite solar cell materials market.

news.headline: Global building insulation market to reach $40.81 billion by 2028. BASF, Saint-Gobain, Owens Corning among dominant players. CAGR of 5.45% projected from 2024-2028.
news.summary: In Dublin, the global building insulation market is projected to reach a value of approximately US$40.81 billion by 2028, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.45% expected during the period from 2024 to 2028. This growth is attributed to factors including the growth of the building and construction sector, heightened focus on greenhouse gas emissions control, and a rising trend towards energy efficiency. The market insights and forecasts are detailed in a recent report now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: TONI & GUY Academies in MA and RI rebranded as COLLECTIV Academy on July 1, 2024, with 3 cosmetology school locations.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, TONI&GUY Academies of New England revealed their new name, Collectiv Academy. This rebranding will be in effect starting July 1, 2024. The cosmetology school has three accredited locations, two situated near Boston in Massachusetts.

news.headline: LTC Properties Inc. declares $0.19 monthly dividend per common share for Q3 2024. Dates: July 31, Aug 30, Sep 30.
news.summary: LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) based in Westlake Village, California, has disclosed a monthly cash dividend of $0.19 per common share for each month in the third quarter of 2024. The dividend payment schedule is as follows: July 31, 2024, August 30, 2024, and September 30, 2024. Record dates are set for July 23, 2024, August 22, 2024, and September 20, 2024, with an equal dividend amount for each period. This initiative by LTC Properties aims to provide consistent returns to its shareholders during the specified quarter.

news.headline: Sompo appoints Christoph Müller as Country Manager, Insurance for Switzerland on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Zurich, Sompo, a prominent global provider of commercial and consumer property and casualty insurance, disclosed the selection of Christoph Müller as the new Country Manager of Insurance for Switzerland.

news.headline: Viridien: Details on total voting rights and share count released.
Datasea signs agreements for 5G AI tech and acoustics, projects $62 million in sales. Growth expected for core AI segment.
news.summary: In Beijing on July 1, 2024, Datasea Inc. (NASDAQ: DTSS), a Nevada-based company specializing in high-tech intelligent acoustics, announced agreements that are expected to drive revenue growth in its core AI-based businesses for fiscal year 2025. The company revealed that three significant agreements have been made to support this growth. Details of the agreements were not provided.

news.headline: Kelley Drye adds 2 partners and 4 special counsels, effective July 1, 2024. Exciting growth for the firm.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Kelley Drye & Warren LLP revealed changes in its leadership with the election of two new partners, Rebecca Durrant and Beth Johnson. The promotions also included four individuals being elevated to the role of special counsel, with Beth Chun among them. This move signifies a strategic decision to strengthen the firm's leadership team, increasing the total number of partners by two and special counsel by four.

news.headline: Asian hospitals use Vuzix smart glasses for surgeries: Linkou CGMH and Dalian MU's First Affiliated; Vuzix M400 smart glasses.
news.summary: Two medical facilities, Linkou Chang Gung Memorial Hospital and First Affiliated Hospital of Dalian Medical University, have utilized Vuzix M400 smart glasses in live surgeries. This innovative technology was employed in ROCHESTER, N.Y., on July 1, 2024. Vuzix® Corporation (NASDAQ: VUZI), a prominent provider of smart glasses, facilitated this initiative.

news.headline: July is the best time to install heated gutters as temperatures soar in Scottsdale, Arizona. Stay ahead of the freeze.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on July 1, 2024, The Brothers that just do Gutters are gearing up for winter by installing heated gutters as summer temperatures climb. This proactive home maintenance measure ensures that homes are prepared for the colder months well ahead of time. By taking this step in July, residents can rest assured that their homes will be equipped for winter's chill.

news.headline: LLS adds 5 new board members incl. hematologists, NFL vet, ops & comm execs; all-woman executive committee.
news.summary: The Leukemia & Lymphoma Society (LLS) has appointed five new members to its board of directors, starting July 1, 2024. This diverse group includes professionals from various backgrounds such as hematologists, a former NFL player, and executives in operations and communications. Additionally, an all-woman executive committee has been established as part of this announcement. This development marks a significant change in the composition of the board, bringing fresh perspectives and expertise to the organization.

news.headline: Dominate 365™ boosts online presence for podiatrists, merges services into program to aid them.
news.summary: In Metuchen, New Jersey, on July 1, 2024, Podiatry Content Connection (PCC) announced that they have been a prominent figure in providing digital content and marketing solutions for podiatry practices globally starting from 2013. PCC recently amalgamated their top 3 services to create a comprehensive program aimed at aiding podiatrists in enhancing their practices.

news.headline: Kimberly A. Fields is the new President and CEO of ATI Inc. with Robert S. Wetherbee as Executive Chairman.
news.summary: In an anticipated leadership move on July 1, 2024, Kimberly A. Fields has assumed the roles of President and CEO at ATI Inc. [NYSE: ATI], taking over from Robert S. "Bob" Wetherbee, who has now transitioned into the position of Executive Chairman. Prior to her new roles, Fields had been serving in a different capacity at ATI.

news.headline: Kinetic commits $250,000 for fiber upgrade in tornado-ravaged Greenfield, Iowa, providing 28,500 feet of new fiber in 320 locations.
news.summary: Following a devastating tornado on May 21, 2024, in Adair County, the community faces significant challenges in rebuilding. In a bid to aid the recovery process, Kinetic has announced a $250,000 investment to restore the damaged communications infrastructure by implementing a buried fiber optic solution. This initiative will involve installing over 28,500 feet (approximately 5.4 miles) of new fiber to serve more than 320 locations in Greenfield. Remarkably, this project will be fully funded by Kinetic, requiring no financial contribution from the state, county, Greenfield residents, or Kinetic customers.

news.headline: SYLA Solar merges with SYLA Biotech Corporation on July 1st, 2024; both based in Shibuya-ku, Tokyo.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, TOKYO - SYLA Solar Co., Ltd. based in Nagoya, Aichi, headed by CEO Takeshi Fuchiwaki, merged with SYLA Biotech Corporation of Shibuya-ku, Tokyo, led by CEO Makoto Ariki. This move integrates the two entities under SYLA Solar, a subsidiary of SYLA Technologies Co., Ltd. headquartered in Shibuya-ku, Tokyo and presided over by CEO Hiroyuki Sugimoto, listed on NASDAQ as “SYT”. SYLA Solar is known for operating Japan's largest membership real estate crowdfunding platform called Rimawari-kun.

news.headline: Global Aseptic Packaging Market projected to reach USD 179.19 Billion by 2033 with a 10.76% CAGR; Current value at USD 64.49 Billion in 2023. Growth driven by demand in food, pharmaceuticals, healthcare sectors.
news.summary: The global Aseptic Packaging Market is forecasted to have a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 10.76% during the period 2024 to 2033. The market size was around USD 64.49 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 71.43 billion in 2024, with a projected market size of approximately USD 179.19 billion by 2033. Aseptic packaging is highlighted for its role in safeguarding against microbial contamination in the packaging process and has significant demand in industries like food and beverage, pharmaceuticals, and healthcare. The market is segmented by packaging type (Cartons, Bottles, Pouches, Bags), technology (Fillers, Sealing Machines, Sterilization Equipment, Packaging Materials), material type (Paperboard, Plastics, Metals, Glass), and end-user industry. Factors driving market growth include the need for pharmaceutical packaging, convenience in packaged foods and beverages, urbanization trends, and advancements in technology leading to increased adoption of aseptic packaging.

news.headline: EU finds Meta's ad-free subscription service violates competition law for forcing users to pay or share personal data for ads.
news.summary: Officials stated that the subscription platform launched in the previous year operates on a "pay or agree" model to gather personal information and enhance advertising efforts.

news.headline: Director's statement issued today revealed company's Q3 revenue up 20% YoY, totaling $5.6 million.
There is an imbalance in the MOO market, with 500 jobs lost and 200 businesses closed due to economic downturn.
Trump Media & Technology Group Corp joins Russell 1000 and Russell 3000 Indexes after reconstitution, effective June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Sarasota, Florida, Trump Media & Technology Group Corp (NASDAQ: DJT) disclosed that it had been chosen for inclusion in the Russell 1000 and Russell 3000 Indexes during the 2024 annual reconstitution. Operator of Truth Social, a platform associated with President Donald J. Trump, the Company's inclusion became effective after the U.S. market closed on June 28, 2024. This move signifies a notable achievement for TMTG within the financial sector.

news.summary: The market research report titled "Global Black Truffles Market: Analysis of Conventional and Organic Categories, Applications, End Uses, Regions - Size, Trends, and Forecast to 2029" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. With a value of US$298.32 million in 2023, the global black truffles market is projected to reach US$515.09 million by 2029, showcasing a growth rate (CAGR) of 9.53% during 2024-2029. The industry is witnessing a promising surge in value and is anticipated to continue on this growth trajectory in the upcoming years.
